diagrams.title: Types of Requirements for Capacity Planning
diagrams.description: Hierarchical breakdown of requirement types that form the basis for capacity goals
diagrams.purpose: Understanding all requirement types for comprehensive capacity goal setting

diagrams.title: Availability Calculation - Downtime per Year

diagrams.title: Scalability Types Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of vertical vs horizontal scalability approaches
elements: Vertical: Single server, more CPU/RAM, Scale UP, Limited by hardware
Horizontal: Multiple servers, load distributed, Scale OUT, Better fault tolerance
diagrams.purpose: Choosing the right scalability strategy for capacity goals
